description: Curated learning resources for CSS layout (Flexbox, Grid, Container Queries)

resources.title: A Complete Guide to Flexbox (CSS-Tricks)
resources.description: The definitive visual guide to Flexbox with diagrams, properties, and examples

resources.title: A Complete Guide to CSS Grid (CSS-Tricks)
resources.description: Comprehensive visual guide to CSS Grid with diagrams, properties, and layout patterns

resources.title: MDN: Flexbox
resources.description: MDN's official Flexbox tutorial with interactive examples and step-by-step guide

resources.title: MDN: CSS Grid Layout
resources.description: MDN's official CSS Grid tutorial with comprehensive examples

resources.title: Container Queries: A Practical Guide (Smashing Magazine)
resources.description: In-depth guide to container queries with real-world use cases and patterns

resources.title: Flexbox Froggy
resources.description: Interactive game that teaches CSS Flexbox through 24 levels of frog-placing puzzles

resources.title: Grid Garden
resources.description: Interactive game that teaches CSS Grid through 28 levels of garden-growing puzzles

resources.title: Flexbox Crash Course (Traversy Media)
resources.description: Complete Flexbox crash course covering all properties with practical examples
resources.creator: Traversy Media

resources.title: CSS Grid Crash Course (Traversy Media)
resources.description: Complete CSS Grid crash course covering all grid properties with hands-on examples
resources.creator: Traversy Media

resources.title: CSS Container Queries Are Going To Change How We Make Layouts
resources.description: Kevin Powell explains container queries with practical demonstrations and use cases
resources.creator: Kevin Powell

resources.title: Griddy — CSS Grid Generator
resources.description: Visual CSS Grid generator — drag and drop to create grid layouts, export CSS

resources.title: Flexulator — Flexbox Calculator
resources.description: Interactive flexbox space distribution calculator with visual feedback

resources.title: Using Subgrid (web.dev)
resources.description: Google's guide to CSS subgrid with examples for aligned card layouts

resources.title: CSS Grid Layout with Template Areas
resources.description: Deep dive into grid-template-areas for semantic, maintainable page layouts
resources.creator: Layout Land

resources.title: Learn CSS Grid (web.dev)
resources.description: Google's comprehensive CSS Grid learning path with interactive playgrounds

resources.title: Intrinsic Web Design (Rachel Andrew)
resources.description: Article by Rachel Andrew on moving from responsive web design to intrinsic design with modern CSS
